context: Tests whether the agent correctly converts .tool-versions exact versions to mise.toml, defines tasks, and addresses the overlap/conflict between asdf and Mise.

checklist.name: All 4 tools pinned at exact same versions
checklist.description: mise.toml [tools] section contains nodejs/node 20.11.0, python 3.11.7, ruby 3.3.0, and terraform 1.7.4 (exact versions, not ranges)

checklist.name: 3 tasks defined as Mise tasks
checklist.description: mise.toml defines [tasks.dev], [tasks.test], and [tasks.lint] with equivalent run commands to the npm scripts

checklist.name: Tasks are self-contained
checklist.description: Task run commands do not rely on implicit shell state; they use explicit commands matching the npm script behavior

checklist.name: MIGRATION.md addresses asdf overlap
checklist.description: MIGRATION.md notes that asdf and Mise should not both be active; instructs team to deactivate asdf or remove .tool-versions to avoid PATH conflicts

checklist.name: MIGRATION.md includes mise install step
checklist.description: MIGRATION.md includes the step to run mise install (and optionally mise doctor) after migration
